name: Wasim Ansari
title: AI/ML Engineer | Gen AI Solution Architect | Chatbot Specialist
summary: AI/ML Engineer, Gen AI Solution Architect, and Chatbot Specialist helping organisations build scalable GenAI and ML systems that automate operational workflows and support smarter decisions. IIT Madras-trained with eight years of cross-domain experience across production-ready machine learning, RAG chatbots, multi-agent systems, AI services, observability, compliance-aware delivery, legal operations, sales, export logistics, and entrepreneurship.

highlights: Designed and deployed production-ready AI solutions integrating advanced ML and GenAI capabilities into enterprise systems.
Collaborated cross-functionally with engineering teams to understand problem statements, plan execution, and deliver high-quality outcomes.
Led rapid experimentation cycles, iterative analysis, and presented actionable recommendations to project leaders.
Built and deployed a time-series forecasting model integrated into ERP systems.
Built a hybrid RAG chatbot using Neo4j graph and vector search for HR automation.
Worked on a multi-agent system for intelligent document review.
Optimized deployed systems for high load, concurrent usage, reliability, stability, and scalability.
Owned debugging, testing, and continuous improvement for deployed AI systems.
Pursued the IIT Madras Diploma in Data Science with focus on deep learning, Generative AI, and cloud-based machine learning systems.
Delivered freelance AI/ML solutions for multiple clients including predictive modeling, AI-powered tools, n8n workflow automation, and operational efficiency improvements.
Built a diverse portfolio of real-world AI/ML projects across end-to-end pipelines.
Led compliance and strategic sales planning that boosted revenue by 20%.
Developed practical interest in ML-based pricing, demand forecasting, and retail analytics.
Managed international B2B logistics, compliance, and digital marketing funnels.
Experience translates into AI interest in supply chain optimization.
Managed property portfolios and client legal clearances.
Certified RERA Broker.
Domain insights inform AI projects in real estate valuation and document automation.
Reviewed legal documentation and case summaries with accuracy and compliance.
Experience inspired automation ideas in document review and compliance QA.
Classified legal cases with 90%+ accuracy in half the average processing time.
Domain insights now support AI-based legal summarizers and database management.

education.notes: Coursework includes Programming Fundamentals (Python, JavaScript, Linux, HTML/CSS, C), Data Structures, Algorithms, Software Development, App Architecture and System Design. Grade: Ongoing.
Coursework includes ML, Linear Algebra, Statistics, Business Analytics, Tools for Data Science, Deep Learning, Gen AI, and Capstone Projects. Grade: CGPA 8.25.

Coursework includes Constitution, Civil and Criminal Laws, Procedural Laws, IPR, Banking Law, Environment Law, and Drafting. Grade: Higher Secondary Class. Participated in 1st Student Parliament and Moot Court Competitions.
